name: The Closer
description: Your final play scores half unless it lands a Power Swing.

name: The Junkballer
description: The first combo of every play is ignored.

name: The Ace
description: Plays that use a Power 7+ card cost 2 plays.

name: The Groundball Goblin
description: Speed is halved, but half of total Defense is added to base.

name: The Umpire
description: One position is getting rung up all inning — those cards score nothing.
